title: tulipa australis var. celsiana
intro: Tulipa australis var. celsiana, also known as the wild tulip or greenglobe tulip, is a perennial bulbous plant that belongs to the lily family (Liliaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Tulipa australis var. celsiana include its ability to aid in the relief of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk remedies and traditional medicine.
